keyPoints: Heuristics are problem-solving techniques that use practical methods to find solutions more quickly than traditional methods.
Indexing in Big Data refers to creating data structures that improve the speed of data retrieval operations on databases.
Navigating Terabytes emphasizes the ability of these techniques to efficiently handle and query massive datasets that are terabytes or larger in size.
commonMistakes: Confusing a hint (a suggested strategy) with a hard rule or constraint in a query optimizer.
Over-indexing data, which can slow down write operations and consume excessive storage space, negating the performance benefits.
